title: LSA and FFA Maintenance Instruction
summary: Weekly and monthly checks for life-saving appliances and fire-fighting appliances.

excerpts.heading: Weekly LSA and FFA inspection
excerpts.summary: Inspect emergency lighting, fire stations, lifebuoys, and visible defects every week.
excerpts.body: Weekly checks shall confirm emergency lighting readiness, fire station integrity, lifebuoy condition, and that defects are reported for immediate correction.

excerpts.heading: Monthly LSA and FFA inspection
excerpts.summary: Perform a deeper inventory and operational check of lifesaving and firefighting equipment monthly.
excerpts.body: Monthly inspections shall verify inventories, expiry-sensitive equipment, communication links, and operational status of lifesaving and firefighting appliances.
